problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
